name: MacKeeper
description: Scareware utility known for aggressive fake-issue popups and high resource usage.

name: Genieo
description: Adware/browser hijacker bundled with free software installers.

name: InstallMac Installer
description: Bundleware installer framework commonly used to distribute potentially unwanted programs.

name: Advanced Mac Cleaner
description: Fake system cleaner that pressures users into paying for a license to fix invented problems.

name: Conduit SearchProtect
description: Browser hijacker that locks in a hijacked search engine and homepage.

name: MacBooster
description: Fake performance-optimization utility that exaggerates system issues to sell upgrades.

name: Genio
description: Adware variant that injects ads into browser sessions.
